description: Use this API to purge specified harmonics branch data from the working case. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.4.0. ierr = har_brn_purg(ibus,jbus,ckt)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of from bus. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: Bus number of to bus. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
